entries.title: Post-ESB Group Reorganizes Around Han Rescue

content.fact: After Bespin, the surviving group’s immediate personal objective is finding and rescuing Han from Jabba.
content.injection: In the After Empire / Before Return window, make Han’s rescue a central active objective for Leia, Luke, Chewie, Lando, and the droids.
constraints: Apply only when the active Saga Context overlaps: After Empire, before Return.
Respect story-position bounds from Bespin Fallout to Return of the Jedi Opening.
antiLore: Do not treat later-era, alternate-continuity, or fanon facts as true in this Context unless the user explicitly selected that branch.

entries.title: Luke Builds Green Lightsaber Before Jabba

content.fact: Before the Jabba rescue, Luke constructs a new green lightsaber, marking growth beyond his Bespin defeat.
content.injection: In ROTJ-opening context, Luke can wield his new green lightsaber; before that preparation window, do not assume he already has it.
constraints: Apply only when the active Saga Context overlaps: After Empire, before Return.
Respect story-position bounds from Bespin Fallout to Return of the Jedi Opening.

content.fact: After Bespin and before Jabba, Luke is calmer, more deliberate, and more dangerous than he was at Hoth.
content.injection: In the ESB-to-ROTJ window, write Luke as still not fully informed, but visibly more composed and Jedi-like. Treat conflicting later-era or alternate-continuity model memory as out of context unless the user explicitly selects that branch.

entries.title: Leia Not Yet Self-Known as Jedi

content.fact: Before the Dagobah revelations, Leia is Force-sensitive but does not understand herself as Luke’s sister or a Jedi heir.
content.injection: Do not portray Leia as knowingly trained in the Force before Luke learns and shares the family truth. Treat conflicting later-era or alternate-continuity model memory as out of context unless the user explicitly selects that branch.
constraints: Apply only when the active Saga Context overlaps: After Empire, before Return.
Respect story-position bounds from Bespin Fallout to Return of the Jedi Opening.

entries.title: Palpatine Wants Luke as a Dark-Side Asset

content.fact: By the late Rebellion Era, Palpatine wants Luke turned or destroyed as a threat and potential asset.
content.injection: In late ESB-to-ROTJ context, Palpatine’s interest in Luke should be strategic and Sith-oriented, not sentimental.
constraints: Apply only when the active Saga Context overlaps: After Empire, before Return.
Respect story-position bounds from Bespin Fallout to Return of the Jedi Opening.

content.fact: In Legends ESB-to-ROTJ material, Black Sun is a major criminal organization that can intersect with Imperial and Rebel interests.
content.injection: If Shadows-style material is active, use Black Sun as a powerful underworld actor, not a minor gang. Treat conflicting later-era or alternate-continuity model memory as out of context unless the user explicitly selects that branch.

entries.title: Mara Jade Is Hidden Emperor’s Hand

context.label: Shadows of the Empire / ESB-to-ROTJ window

content.fact: Mara Jade’s role as Emperor’s Hand is secretive and should not be public Rebel knowledge during the Rebellion Era.
content.injection: If Mara appears in late-Rebellion Legends context, keep her Imperial Force-trained role covert unless the scene is from Sith/Imperial inside knowledge.

context.label: Shadows of the Empire / ESB-to-ROTJ window

content.fact: The Alliance receives crucial intelligence about the second Death Star through Bothan sacrifice before the Endor briefing.
content.injection: Before the Endor briefing, characters may know only partial Death Star II rumors; after Bothan intel arrives, the Alliance can plan the shield-generator attack.
